applicationWindow.notes: Archery deer is OTC for NR. Firearm deer permits allocated via lottery/draw for some seasons.

nr.notes: NR archery combo ~$150. One of the top trophy whitetail states — Pike, Adams, and Brown counties produce world-class bucks.

pointSystem.notes: Firearm permits via lottery; archery is OTC.

otc.notes: Archery OTC; firearm seasons are draw.
